name: Fringe Benefit Exclusion

eligibility.description: Employees receiving specific benefits (like health insurance or qualified transportation) that are excluded from gross income under other sections of the Code.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: While Section 61 includes fringe benefits in gross income, it specifically notes 'Except as otherwise provided,' pointing to other sections that allow for the exclusion of specific employer-provided benefits.
